message:
feat(workflows): add verification refs and policy summaries to step logs

Enhance workflow step logging with rich metadata for debugging
and audit purposes:

- Add build_verification_refs to capture verification evidence
  from step results and plans
- Add step_error_code_from_result for stable error classification
- Add policy_summary_from_injection to serialize policy decisions
- Update insert_step_log calls with new metadata fields

The verification refs include:
- Plan-specified verification strategies
- Wait conditions and timeouts
- Post-send wait conditions

This improves observability for workflow execution failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
